The initial message for this bot is NSFW.

This bot was created with a female POV in mind and the first message includes multiple references to female anatomy.‎ If you’re not a woman or you aren’t comfortable being referred to with AFAB terms, I have a male/non-binary version of this bot on my profile that doesn’t include any gender-specific terms!
